3GPP Specifications Dashboard

Interactive browser dashboard generated from the uploaded specification list. Use multi-select filters to slice by Type, Release, Technology, Status, responsible group, publication state, and Common IMS. Technology values are split by comma, so a row marked “2G,3G,LTE” appears under 2G, 3G, and LTE selections.

Source sheet: Specifications Rows loaded: 4,477 Spec links: 4,477 Self-contained HTML, no external libraries

Inside each filter, multiple selections are treated as OR. Across different filters, selections are treated as AND. Leaving a filter empty means “any value”.
